message:
fix(demo_showcase): resolve borrow conflicts in files page navigation

Refactor enter_directory() to avoid borrow checker conflicts:
- Extract entry data into local tuple before mutating self
- Separate read phase (filtering visible entries, getting entry data)
  from write phase (updating virtual_path, entries, selection)
- Use Option pattern to handle directory vs file entry cases

Improve toggle_hidden() with proper selection clamping after filter change

These changes fix Rust borrow checker errors that occurred when
attempting to read filtered entries while mutating page state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
